heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 3108 Authorization of appropriations
text: To carry out this chapter, there are authorized to be appropriated $4,400,000 for the fiscal year ending , $4,500,000 for the fiscal year ending , $4,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , and such sums as may be necessary for any subsequent fiscal years.September 30, 1980September 30, 1981September 30, 1982
notes: Amendments1981— inserted provisions authorizing appropriations of $4,000,000 for fiscal year ending , and such sums as might be necessary for any subsequent fiscal years.Pub. L. 97–33Sept. 30, 19821979— substituted provisions authorizing appropriations of $4,400,000 for fiscal year ending , and $4,500,000 for fiscal year ending , for provisions authorizing appropriations of $4,000,000 for fiscal year ending .Pub. L. 96–72Sept. 30, 1980Sept. 30, 1981Sept. 30, 19791978— increased authorization from $1,000,000 to $4,000,000, and struck out provisions authorizing appropriation of $1,000,000 for fiscal year ending .Pub. L. 95–381Sept. 30, 1978

Effective Date of 1979 Amendment, , , which provided that the amendment made to this section by would take effect on , was repealed by , , .Pub. L. 96–72, § 23(b)93 Stat. 536Pub. L. 96–72Pub. L. 115–232, div. A, title XVII, § 1766(a)132 Stat. 2232Sept. 29, 1979Oct. 1, 1979Aug. 13, 2018

Effective Date of 1978 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 95–381, § 492 Stat. 726Sept. 22, 1978“The amendment made by the first section of this Act [amending this section] shall take effect on .”October 1, 1978
